name: pi-tokyo-night-storm
description: Tokyo Night Storm theme for pi coding agent
readme:
# pi-tokyo-night-storm

A [Tokyo Night Storm](https://github.com/enkia/tokyo-night-vscode-theme) theme for [pi coding agent](https://shittycodingagent.ai).

## Install

```bash
pi install git:github.com/sanathks/pi-tokyo-night-storm
```

Then activate it via `/settings` and select **tokyo-night-storm**.

## Colors

| Role | Color |
|------|-------|
| Accent / Functions | `#7aa2f7` blue |
| Keywords | `#bb9af7` purple |
| Strings | `#9ece6a` green |
| Numbers | `#ff9e64` orange |
| Types | `#2ac3de` teal |
| Operators | `#89ddff` cyan |
| Comments | `#5f6996` muted blue |
| Success | `#73daca` teal green |
| Error | `#f7768e` red |
| Warning | `#e0af68` yellow |
| Background | `#24283b` storm |

## Credits

Color palette based on [Tokyo Night](https://github.com/enkia/tokyo-night-vscode-theme) by Enkia.
